# ASTC Encoder WASM

Vendored from `astc-encoder-wasm` 1.0.4. The package is an Apache-2.0
WebAssembly port of Arm `astcenc` 5.3.0. It is used only by the Codec
Laboratory ASTC worker.

Files:

- `astcenc.mjs` — Emscripten ES module wrapper.
- `astcenc.wasm` — encoder and decoder binary.

Upstream encoder: https://github.com/ARM-software/astc-encoder
Archived package: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/astc-encoder-wasm@1.0.4/
